summary: Completed testing of Iteration 13 features: (1) Bold WINNER verdict at top of consultation results with winner_short, strength, text, (2) Visual odds comparison bars for both teams (model vs market), (3) Betting scenarios with type, title, description, confidence, timing, (4) 50K simulations (upgraded from 10K), (5) Odds visual data with edge/fair odds/overround, (6) Market momentum toggle, (7) RE-PREDICT button in prediction breakdown. All 25 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified.
passed_tests: POST /api/matches/{id}/consult returns verdict object with winner, winner_short, strength, text
verdict.winner_short is CSK or RCB (correct short names)
verdict.strength is one of DOMINANT, STRONG, SLIGHT, TOSS-UP
betting_scenarios has at least 1 item when market odds provided
betting_scenario has type, title, description, confidence, timing fields
betting_scenario.type is one of PRE_MATCH, IN_PLAY_POWERPLAY, PLAYER_OUTBURST, CHASE_DYNAMIC
odds_visual has team1_model_pct and team2_model_pct (sum to ~100)
odds_visual has team1_market_pct and team2_market_pct matching input
odds_visual has overround when market odds provided
API health endpoint returns Gamble Consultant message
Frontend: verdict-section visible with 'CSK WINS' and 'STRONG' badge
Frontend: odds-visual-section visible with Model vs Market bars
Frontend: betting-scenarios section visible with scenario cards
Frontend: market momentum selector with ODDS RISING and ODDS FALLING labels
Frontend: RE-PREDICT button visible in Algorithm Prediction header
Frontend: empty state shows '50,000 simulations' text
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: None - used existing match ipl2026_011 (CSK vs RCB)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 features fully working. Key features tested: (1) verdict object in consult response with winner, winner_short (CSK/RCB), strength (DOMINANT/STRONG/SLIGHT/TOSS-UP), text, winner_probability. (2) betting_scenarios array with PRE_MATCH, IN_PLAY_POWERPLAY, PLAYER_OUTBURST, CHASE_DYNAMIC types. (3) odds_visual object with team1_model_pct, team2_model_pct, team1_market_pct, team2_market_pct, edge_team1, team1_fair_odds, team2_fair_odds, overround. (4) simulation.simulations = 50000. (5) Frontend shows verdict section with bold 'CSK WINS' text, odds comparison bars, betting scenarios cards, 50K simulations text. Test match ipl2026_011 (CSK vs RCB) used with market_pct_team1=30, market_pct_team2=70.

frontend_ui.verdict_section: data-testid='verdict-section' - shows 'CSK WINS' with STRONG badge
frontend_ui.odds_visual_section: data-testid='odds-visual-section' - shows model vs market bars
